project(rawspeed CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

set(RAWSPEED_SOURCE_DIR ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR})
set(RAWSPEED_BINARY_DIR ${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR})

include(cmake/cmake-command-wrappers.cmake)

rawspeed_add_library(rawspeed STATIC)

include(cmake/Modules/thread-local.cmake)
include(cmake/Modules/cpu-cache-line-size.cmake)
include(cmake/Modules/cpu-page-size.cmake)
include(cmake/Modules/cpu-large-page-size.cmake)

configure_file(${RAWSPEED_SOURCE_DIR}/src/config.h.in ${RAWSPEED_BINARY_DIR}/src/rawspeedconfig.h)
target_include_directories(rawspeed PUBLIC ${RAWSPEED_BINARY_DIR}/src)

add_subdirectory(src/librawspeed)

add_library(rawspeed::rawspeed ALIAS rawspeed)
